changes: Phalanx: Reduced damage taken changed from 50% to 33%.
Blota: Heavy effect duration reduced from 5 to 3 seconds.
Phantom Rush: Potency increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Sky Shatter: Potency reduced from 20,000 to 18,000.
Sky Shatter: Potency increase when targets are within 5 yalms changed from 30,000 to 32,000.
Sky Shatter: Barrier strength changed from absorbing damage totaling 25% of maximum HP to absorbing damage equivalent to a heal of 24,000 potency.
Fuma Shuriken: Range reduced from 25 to 20 yalms.
Hyosho Ranryu: Range reduced from 25 to 20 yalms.
Goka Mekkyaku: Range reduced from 25 to 20 yalms.
Plentiful Harvest: Maximum potency increased from 20,000 to 24,000.
Curing Waltz: Healing potency increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Burst: Barrier strength increased from 12,000 to 16,000.
Magick Barrier: Effect duration increased from 8 to 10 seconds.
Frazzle: Effect duration increased from 8 to 10 seconds.
Southern Cross: Healing potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Southern Cross: Damage potency increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Southern Cross: Cure potency increase from White Shift reduced from 100% to 50%.
Southern Cross: Damage potency increase from Black Shift reduced from 100% to 50%.
Adloquium: Cure potency reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
Adloquium: Barrier strength increased from 4,000 to 6,000.
Fall Malefic: Recast time reduction granted by additional effect 'Reduces the recast time of Double Cast' changed from 7.5 to 10 seconds.
